name: specify-architecture
when_to_use: When the work item already has requirements and approach and needs an architecture specification.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous architecture flow.

steps.details: Use the system review flow to confirm the requirements, approach, and current constraints.

steps.description: Run `powdrr-lift architecture-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name> --entity-type <type> ...` to generate the template.
steps.details: Generate the architecture template with the full allowed entity type set so validation can enforce the schema.

steps.description: Fill out entities, relationships, invariants, and guidance using only the allowed entity types.
steps.details: Keep references explicit and make sure every invariant or guidance item points at listed entities or relationships.

steps.description: Validate with `powdrr-lift evaluate-architecture-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name> --entity-type <type> ...` and fix any validation errors.
steps.details: Re-run validation until there are no unknown types or broken references.
